title: Add typed recall schema validation
goal: Replace ad-hoc recall dictionaries with a typed schema layer for recall item/export validation without changing runtime authority.

metadata.source: deferred from PR #116 review; current PR intentionally kept small without Pydantic/dataclass refactor
metadata.non_goal: Does not add new recall behavior or source verification by itself.

acceptance.assertion: Recall item/export schemas explicitly define required fields, allowed enum values, bounded text, evidence refs and non-claims.
Exporter validates every item against the schema before returning it.
Existing PR #116 output shape remains backward compatible unless a migration note is recorded.
Focused tests cover valid item/export, missing field, invalid enum, too-long field, unsupported evidence type and compatibility.
